label: Safety critical
definition: Unsafe recommendation or hard stop missed
examples: Chest pain cleared for NAD; low eGFR magnesium suggested
required_action: Contain output, alert cockpit, clinician review

label: Clinical logic wrong
definition: Wrong CDS logic without immediate danger
examples: Wrong stack family; lab rule failed
required_action: Trace, patch proposal, validation, clinician review

label: Evidence/source/version issue
definition: Citation unsupported, stale protocol, manifest mismatch
required_action: Source audit, manifest check, patch if needed

label: Nonclinical/UI/integration bug
definition: Display/API issue with no clinical effect
